title: Vella Manam Ulla Machan Lyrics Muthal Seethanam
stanzas:
<div>
Vella Manam Ulla Machan Lyrics Muthal Seethanam

vellai manam ulla machchan
vizhiyoram eeram enna

pakkathile naanirundhum
thukkathile nee irundhaa
karaiserum kaalam eppo

vellai manam ulla machchan
vizhiyoram eeram enna

kalla manam mullu thachchi
kanneeril moozhguthadi

pakkathile naan azhuga
thukkathile nee azhuga
karai serum kaalam ippo.

kalla manam mullu thachchi
kanneeril moozhguthadi

sengarumba naan marandhu
vaeli mulla yaen kadichen.
poovukkullum naagam undu
saamikkumthaan veedu rendu.

kallaiyum paalaa nee nenacha
mullaiyum poovaa nee mudicha.
ponathellaam pogattumga
yaarum ingae raman illa.

vellai manam ulla machchan
vilaiyaadi oanji vandhaan.

pakkathile nee irundhaa
sorgathile naan midhappaen.
enaalum serndhiruppen

vellai manam ulla machchan
vilaiyaadi oanji vandhaan.

koodu vittu pona kili
koadi kitta serndhathammaa
jodi vandhu serndha kili
kodi sugam kaanuthammaa

siripiya pola naan irundhu
sindhiya thaena serthuvachchen
engulathil paiya vanthaa
innum konjam kollaiyadi.

vellai manam ulla machchan
vilaiyaadi oanji vandhaan.

pakkathile nee irundhaa
sorgathile naan midhappaen.
enaalum serndhiruppen

vellai manam ulla machchan
vilaiyaadi oanji vandhaan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and nostalgia, reflecting on past memories and emotions.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Muthal Seethanam.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Malaysia Vasudevan.

What year was the song released?

The song was released in 1992.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vella Manam Ulla Machan, the lyrics evoke a deep sense of nostalgia and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotional turmoil of the characters in Muthal Seethanam. The song's soothing melody, paired with Malaysia Vasudevan's soulful voice, creates an atmosphere of reflection and melancholy. It conveys the bittersweet nature of memories, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love and loss. This timeless piece continues to resonate with listeners, reminding them of the beauty and pain of cherished moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vella Manam Ulla Machan is a haunting melody that resonates with the soul, capturing the essence of longing and nostalgia. This timeless classic from the Muthal Seethanam movie showcases the unparalleled vocal prowess of Malaysia Vasudevan, making it a must-listen for fans of old Tamil music. Dive into the emotional depths of this song and experience its captivating charm.
stanzaMeanings: Vella Manam Ulla Machan Lyrics Muthal Seethanam
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend?
If I am nearby and you are resting, when will the time come?
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend?
A heart of stone pricks like a thorn, it falls into tears.
If I am beautiful nearby and you are beautiful, the time is now.
A heart of stone pricks like a thorn, it falls into tears.
I forgot the red flower and got caught in the thorn. Even in flowers, there is a snake, and that is the house for both.
If you think of the stone and the flower, everything will go away, but no one is here, not even Raman.
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend? It has come like a game.
If you are nearby, I will be in heaven. But I will still join you.
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend? It has come like a game.
When the bird leaves the nest, it joins with another. Will the pair of birds find happiness together?
Like a smile, I have mixed honey with the morning. A boy has come to our place, let’s enjoy a little more.
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend? It has come like a game.
If you are nearby, I will be in heaven. But I will still join you.
What is the feeling when I see you, my friend? It has come like a game.
